case_title: ISABELLE ESSEL MOHA VS. EVA VALDEBENITO

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE $40.00 SERVED APR-11-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT VALDEBENITO, EVA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-23-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-23-2016 BY JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF BY REPRESENTATIVE ISABELLE ESSEL MOHA--PARTNER. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: L. FONG; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER OF EXAMINATION RETURNED SERVED, SERVICE DATE: AUG-02-2016 FEE FOR PERSONAL SERVICE OF OEX: $40.00. AS TO DEFENDANT VALDEBENITO, EVA
ORDER RE: CONTINUED. ENFORCMENT OF THE JUDGMENT IS STAYED (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOHA, ISABELLE ESSEL DBA HECTOR & LOLA USA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-23-2016 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MOHA, ISABELLE ESSEL DBA HECTOR & LOLA USA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VALDEBENITO, EVA $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,090.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT VALDEBENITO, EVA HEARING SET FOR SEP-01-2016 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT VALDEBENITO, EVA

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF SEP-01-2016 IS CONTINUED PURSUANT TO STIPULATION OF THE PARTIES TO NOV-03-2016 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ISSABELLE ESSEL MOHA, DBA HECTOR & LOLA USA, AND DEFENDANT'S REPRESENTATIVE ANTHONI CHARLES DIKE, THE "SIGNIFICANT OTHER" OF EVA VALDEBENITO. PROOF OF SERVICE FILED TODAY, 9/1/16, IN DIRECT CONTRAVENTION OF LOCAL RULE 8.9C. ADDITIONALLY, PRIOR TO COMMENCEMENT OF TODAY'S PROCEEDINGS, MR. DIKE SUBMITTED A LETTER FROM DEFENDANT EVA VALDEBENITO WHICH READS IN PERTINENT PART "I HAD SURGERY 08/30/16 ON MY LEFT KNEE. I AM UNABLE TO WALK AND THEREFORE CANNOT ATTEND THIS MOTION." JUDGE PRO TEM: DEBORAH DANILOFF. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
ORDER RE: ORDER OF EXAMINATION. OFF CALENDAR. NO APPEARANCES (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF NOV-03-2016 IS CONTINUED TO NOV-17-2016 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 BENCH LETTER ISSUED. APPEARANCE BY ISABELLE ESSEL MOHA ONLY. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF NOV-17-2016 IS CONTINUED TO MAY-11-2017 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR ISABELLE ESSEL MOHA. NO APPEARANCE BY JUDGMENT DEBTOR. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER CONTINUED TO MAY 11, 2017 AT 11:00. ENFORCEMENT OF JUDGMENT IS STAYED PENDING CHAPTER 7 PROCEEDING IN U.S. BANKRUPTCY COURT CASE # 16-43076 CN 7 (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF NOV-27-2017 IS OFF CALENDAR - NO APPEARANCES. NO APPEARANCE BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR ISABELLE ESSEL MOHA. NO APPEARANCE BY JUDGMENT DEBTOR EVA VALDEBENITO. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY MOHA, ISABELLE ESSEL DBA HECTOR & LOLA USA AS TO DEFENDANT VALDEBENITO, EVA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-23-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF MAY-11-2017 IS CONTINUED TO NOV-27-2017 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. THE MATTER IS STAYED. JUDGMENT DEBTOR FILED CHAPTER 7 IN BANKRUPTCY COURT. NO APPEARANCE BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR ISABELLE ESSEL MOHA. NO APPEARANCE BY JUDGMENT DEBTOR EVA VALDEBENITO. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
DOCUMENTS SUBMITTED BY THIRD PARTY RE: BANKRUPTCY DISCHARGE FORWADED TO 506 FILED BY DEFENDANT VALDEBENITO, EVA
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: BENCH LETTER MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 11/03/16. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED-UNABLE TO FORWARD."
